# Delx Wellness Hermes
Turn Hermes into a local-first wellness agent with guided setup, onboarding, MCP connector presets, wellness skills and doctor checks.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/delx-wellness-hermes
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/hermes
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/delx-wellness-hermes
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=delx-wellness-hermes -- delx-wellness-hermes doctor
MCP command: delx-wellness-hermes
Agent surfaces:
- See README for install and runtime surfaces.
- OpenClaw sibling profile pack: https://github.com/davidmosiah/delx-wellness-openclaw
- Default profile presets include WHOOP, Garmin, Oura, Strava, Fitbit, Google Health, Withings, Apple Health, Samsung Health, Polar and Nourish.
- Start with the connection/status or agent-manifest surface when available.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
Safety:
- Do not paste credentials, OAuth tokens, refresh tokens, API keys or raw private exports into chat.
- Keep local config and generated data out of git.
- Treat outputs as operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice unless the repo explicitly supports that domain.
